ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock price is quoted */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock analyzed in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, volatility analysis) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the predicted metric */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model or method used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the original news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reply */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress percentage of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock visualized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the visualization is shared */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the visualization */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
